title: ezkart | 5"x7" | Pack of 100 Assorted coloured striped paper bags Ideal for multiple occasions. Quality paper sweet bags (Purple, 5x7-100 Bags)
features: (Pack of 100) - The 5"x7" size of the paper bags makes them perfect for small paper bags and party favors. These striped Candy cake bags for Sweet Flavour Buffet Wedding Cake Gift Shop, Kids Party.

The inks are water based and the paper is fully recyclable making them a great eco-friendly option. Great quality and amazing presentation inside and out a Great choice pink sweets bag.
These bags are great for Greeting Cards, Sweet Shops and anyone who wants to achieve a nostalgic feel - and now we commonly sell them for weddings, parties events and paper bags for food.
These paper bags are made from strong 36gsm Kraft Paper. Vibrant patterns printed on them make the paper honeycomb gift bags modern & decorative for wedding cake gifts, kid's parties and much more!
